languageModelTools.name: synthesis_optimize

prompt.description: The raw prompt text to optimize (20–200k chars).
prompt.title: Prompt

strategy.description: Optimization strategy name (e.g. 'auto', 'chain-of-thought', 'few-shot', 'meta-prompting', 'role-playing', 'structured-output'). Defaults to user preference or 'auto'.
strategy.title: Strategy

repo_full_name.description: GitHub repo in 'owner/repo' format for codebase-aware optimization.
repo_full_name.title: Repo Full Name

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the workspace root for context injection.
workspace_path.title: Workspace Path

applied_pattern_ids.description: List of MetaPattern IDs to inject into the optimizer context. Get these from synthesis_match results.
applied_pattern_ids.title: Applied Pattern Ids

languageModelTools.userDescription: Run the full optimization pipeline on a prompt.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Run the full optimization pipeline on a prompt.

    Call this to optimize any prompt. Returns the improved prompt, quality scores,
    and follow-up suggestions.

    Five execution paths (auto-selected by routing):
    1. force_passthrough → returns assembled_prompt for your LLM to process
    2. force_sampling + sampling capable → full pipeline via IDE's LLM
    3. Local provider → full internal pipeline
    4. No provider + MCP sampling → full pipeline via IDE's LLM
    5. Fallback → returns assembled_prompt for your LLM to process

    If status='pending_external': process the assembled_prompt with your LLM,
    then call synthesis_save_result(trace_id=<returned trace_id>,
    optimized_prompt=<your result>, scores={clarity, specificity, structure,
    faithfulness, conciseness — each 1.0-10.0}).

    Chain: Call synthesis_match BEFORE this tool to get applied_pattern_ids.
    Call synthesis_feedback AFTER using the result to close the learning loop.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_analyze

prompt.description: The raw prompt text to analyze (min 20 chars).
prompt.title: Prompt

languageModelTools.userDescription: Analyze a prompt and generate baseline quality scores.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Analyze a prompt and generate baseline quality scores.

    Call BEFORE synthesis_optimize to understand prompt weaknesses and get a
    strategy recommendation. Returns task classification, strengths, weaknesses,
    recommended strategy, and baseline scores (5 dimensions).

    Chain: Use the returned selected_strategy when calling synthesis_optimize.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_prepare_optimization

prompt.description: The raw prompt text to prepare for external optimization (min 20 chars).
prompt.title: Prompt

strategy.description: Optimization strategy name. Defaults to user preference or 'auto'.
strategy.title: Strategy

max_context_tokens.description: Maximum context window budget in tokens.
max_context_tokens.title: Max Context Tokens

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the workspace root for context injection.
workspace_path.title: Workspace Path

repo_full_name.description: GitHub repo in 'owner/repo' format for codebase-aware optimization.
repo_full_name.title: Repo Full Name

languageModelTools.userDescription: Assemble the full optimization prompt for processing by YOUR LLM.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Assemble the full optimization prompt for processing by YOUR LLM.

    This is step 1 of the passthrough workflow:
    (1) Call this tool to get assembled_prompt and trace_id.
    (2) Process assembled_prompt with your LLM to produce an optimized version.
    (3) Call synthesis_save_result with the trace_id and the optimized output.

    Use when you want your own LLM to perform the optimization instead of
    the server's provider.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_save_result

optimized_prompt.description: The optimized prompt text produced by your LLM.
optimized_prompt.title: Optimized Prompt

changes_summary.description: Brief summary of changes made during optimization.
changes_summary.title: Changes Summary

strategy_used.description: Strategy name used. Normalized to known strategies if verbose.
strategy_used.title: Strategy Used

scores.description: Self-rated scores dict with keys: clarity, specificity, structure, faithfulness, conciseness (1.0-10.0 float, clamped to this range).
scores.title: Scores

model.description: Model ID that produced the optimization.
model.title: Model

codebase_context.description: IDE-provided codebase context snapshot to store alongside the result.
codebase_context.title: Codebase Context

domain.description: Domain category: 'backend', 'frontend', 'database', 'devops', 'security', 'fullstack', or 'general'. Defaults to 'general' if not provided.
domain.title: Domain

intent_label.description: Short 3-6 word intent classification label. Defaults to 'general'.
intent_label.title: Intent Label

languageModelTools.userDescription: Persist an optimization result from an external LLM with hybrid scoring.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Persist an optimization result from an external LLM with hybrid scoring.

    This is step 3 of the passthrough workflow (after synthesis_prepare_optimization
    or after synthesis_optimize returns status='pending_external').
    Blends self-rated scores with model-independent heuristics (z-score normalization
    + dimension-specific weights) and computes score deltas against the original prompt.

    Chain: Call synthesis_feedback AFTER using the optimized prompt to report quality.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_health
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check system capabilities and health before starting a workflow.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Check system capabilities and health before starting a workflow.

    Call at the START of any optimization session. Returns available routing
    tiers (internal/sampling/passthrough), active provider, and loaded strategies.
    Use this to decide whether synthesis_optimize will work or if you need
    synthesis_prepare_optimization (passthrough fallback).

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_strategies
languageModelTools.userDescription: List available optimization strategies with descriptions.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
List available optimization strategies with descriptions.

    Call BEFORE synthesis_optimize to choose the best strategy for your prompt
    instead of defaulting to 'auto'. Returns strategy names, taglines, and
    descriptions. Pass the returned name to synthesis_optimize's strategy parameter.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_history
languageModelTools.userDescription: Query optimization history with filtering and sorting.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Query optimization history with filtering and sorting.

    Use to find past optimizations by task type, check which strategies
    performed well (sort by overall_score desc), or find an optimization
    to refine. Returns paginated summaries with 200-char prompt previews.

    Chain: Call synthesis_get_optimization with a returned ID to get full details.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_get_optimization

optimization_id.description: ID of the optimization to retrieve.
optimization_id.title: Optimization Id

languageModelTools.userDescription: Retrieve full details of a specific optimization by ID.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Retrieve full details of a specific optimization by ID.

    Call after browsing synthesis_history to get the complete optimized prompt
    text, or before synthesis_refine to understand what needs improving.
    Returns full prompt texts, scores, feedback status, and refinement count.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_match

prompt_text.description: Prompt text to match against the knowledge graph (min 10 chars).
prompt_text.title: Prompt Text

languageModelTools.userDescription: Search the knowledge graph for clusters and reusable patterns similar to a prompt.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Search the knowledge graph for clusters and reusable patterns similar to a prompt.

    Call BEFORE synthesis_optimize to leverage past optimization knowledge.
    Returns match quality (family/cluster/none), similarity score, cluster info,
    and meta-pattern IDs.

    Chain: Pass returned meta_patterns[].id values as applied_pattern_ids to
    synthesis_optimize for knowledge-informed optimization.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_feedback

optimization_id.description: ID of the optimization to rate.
optimization_id.title: Optimization Id

rating.description: Quality rating: 'thumbs_up' if the optimized prompt worked well, 'thumbs_down' if it underperformed.
rating.title: Rating

comment.description: Optional explanation of what worked or didn't.
comment.title: Comment

languageModelTools.userDescription: Submit quality feedback on a completed optimization to drive strategy adaptation.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Submit quality feedback on a completed optimization to drive strategy adaptation.

    Call AFTER using an optimized prompt and observing its effectiveness.
    Use 'thumbs_up' when the result produced good outcomes, 'thumbs_down'
    when it underperformed. The system learns which strategies work best
    for each task type based on accumulated feedback.

languageModelTools.name: synthesis_refine

optimization_id.description: ID of the optimization to refine.
optimization_id.title: Optimization Id

refinement_request.description: Specific refinement instruction (e.g., 'add more concrete examples', 'strengthen the error handling section', 'make it more concise').
refinement_request.title: Refinement Request

branch_id.description: Branch ID to refine on. Omit to use the latest branch.
branch_id.title: Branch Id

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to workspace root for codebase context.
workspace_path.title: Workspace Path

languageModelTools.userDescription: Iteratively improve an optimized prompt with specific instructions.
languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Iteratively improve an optimized prompt with specific instructions.

    Call after synthesis_optimize when the result needs targeted improvement.
    Each call is a fresh pipeline invocation (not multi-turn accumulation).
    Returns the refined prompt, updated scores, score deltas, and suggestions.

    Chain: Call synthesis_feedback after the final refinement to close the loop.

languageModelToolSets.name: synthesis
languageModelToolSets.description: Prompt optimization and analysis tools from Project Synthesis

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
